        <style>
           

            .test-overflow img.block.w-auto.h-full {
                width: 150px !important;
                height: 36px;
                /* margin-top: -15px; */
            }

            @font-face {
                font-family: Recoleta;
                src: url("https://db.onlinewebfonts.com/t/67415ab41a7350f81536b69763e6d031.woff")format("woff"),
            }

    </style>
    <meta name="theme-color" content="rgb(59 130 246)">

                        <style>
                .-skew-y-3 {
    --tw-skew-y: 0deg !important;
}

.w-580 {
    width: 51.25rem !important;
}

.shadow-\[0_10px_30px_rgba\(0\,0\,0\,0\.08\)\] {
    --tw-shadow: none !important;
    --tw-shadow-colored: none !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
}

.text-3xl {
    font-size: 2.775rem!important;
    line-height: normal!important;
    font-weight: 700!important;
}

.text-\[0\.938rem\] {
    font-size: 1.238rem!important;
}

.h-128 {
    height: 6rem !important;
}


.text-white {
    --tw-text-opacity: 1;

}

header.relative.mb-14.md\:mb-60.overflow-hidden.isolate {
    min-height: 100%;
}


body div#root {
    overflow-x: hidden !important;
}


.no-page-overflow, .no-page-overflow body, .no-page-overflow #root {
    overflow: unset !important;
}


.dashboard-grid-content.overflow-y-auto {
    overflow-y: visible !important;
    overflow-x: auto !important;
}



.dashboard-grid.test-overflow.relative.isolate.h-full {
    overflow: hidden;
}


.dashboard-grid-sidenav-left::-webkit-scrollbar {

    display: none!important;
}


#root div.flex.flex-col.h-full.relative {
    height: 100% !important;
}

.h-full {
    height: 100%;

}
/*iframe.h-full.w-full.flex-auto {*/
/*    min-height: 100vh;*/
/*}*/

.ads1 {
    /* border: dotted 2px; */
    padding: 0.5rem;
    margin: 20px;
    border-radius: 6px;
}


.dashboard-grid-navbar {
    color: #212121 !important;
    background: #fff !important;
    /* border: none; */
    border-bottom-color: #d8dadc!important;
}

.rounded {
    border-radius: 1rem !important;
}

.rounded-lg {
    border-radius: 1.25rem !important;
}

.mycard {
    background-color: rgba(40, 40, 40, .7)!important;
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px)!important;
    backdrop-filter: blur(30px)!important;
    /* box-shadow: 0 0 12px #0000001a, 0 10px 30px #0003; */
    border-radius: 1.25rem!important;
    border: none!important;
    box-shadow: inset 2px 4px 16px 0 hsla(0, 0%, 97%, .06)!important;
}

.rounded-tl-none {
    border-top-left-radius: 0!important;
}
.rounded-bl-none {
    border-bottom-left-radius: 0!important;
}

.rounded-tr-none {
    border-top-right-radius: 0!important;
}
.rounded-br-none {
    border-bottom-right-radius: 0!important;
}

.login_button {
    padding: 4px 24px;
    border-color: #fff;
    border: 2px solid;
    color: #fff;
    margin-right: 15px;
    background-color: rgba(40, 40, 40, .7) !important;
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px) !important;
    backdrop-filter: blur(30px) !important;
    /* box-shadow: 0 0 12px #0000001a, 0 10px 30px #0003; */
    border-radius: 1.25rem !important;
    border: none !important;
    box-shadow: inset 2px 4px 16px 0 hsla(0, 0%, 97%, .06) !important;
}

.login_button:hover {}

.pop_icon {
    filter: brightness(100%)!important;
}

.pop_links a {

    color: #ffffff!important;
}

.offcanvas {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 0;
    z-index: var(--bs-offcanvas-zindex);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    max-width: 100%;
    color: var(--bs-offcanvas-color);
    visibility: hidden;
    /* background-color: var(--bs-offcanvas-bg); */
    background-clip: padding-box;
    outline: 0;
    transition: var(--bs-offcanvas-transition);
    background-color: rgb(40 40 40 / 0%) !important;

    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px) !important;
    backdrop-filter: blur(30px) !important;
}

.myheader {

    background: #444444!important;
}

}


.dashboard-grid-sidenav-left {

    scrollbar-gutter: stable!important;

<!-- Vijay dodiya Custom code -->
<script>
    $(document).ready(function() {
        function removeInlineStyle() {
            var $element = $("#root .flex.flex-col.h-full.relative");
            $element.removeAttr("style");
        }

        // Set an interval to run the function every N milliseconds (e.g., every 5000 milliseconds or 5 seconds)
        setInterval(removeInlineStyle, 2000);
    });
</script>
